entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An integrated approach to managing landscapes to address food security, adaptation, and mitigation of climate change.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region of focus for the review of climate-smart agriculture development.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE AND VARIABILITY
entities.description: Environmental fluctuations and long-term shifts in weather patterns that create vulnerability in the region.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT GOALS
entities.description: Global targets for development that agriculture is expected to help deliver.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: AGROFORESTRY
entities.description: A land use management system that combines trees or shrubs with crops and/or livestock.

entities.name: FARMER-MANAGED NATURAL REGENERATIONS
entities.description: A low-cost land restoration technique involving the management of natural regrowth.

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Techniques used to prevent soil erosion and optimize water use in agriculture.

entities.name: ZAI
entities.description: A traditional planting pit technique used for water harvesting.

entities.name: HALF-MOON
entities.description: A semi-circular earth bund used for water harvesting.

entities.name: TIE/CONTOUR RIDGES
entities.description: Ridges built along contours to reduce water runoff.

entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A farming system promoting minimum soil disturbance and organic soil cover.

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION SERVICES
entities.description: The provision of climate data and forecasts to help farmers manage risks.

entities.name: MULTI-STAKEHOLDER INNOVATION PLATFORMS
entities.description: Institutional settings for collaboration among various actors to promote innovation.

entities.name: NATIONAL SCIENCE POLICY DIALOGUE PLATFORMS
entities.description: Forums for discussing and shaping science policy on climate-smart agriculture.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA CSA ALLIANCE
entities.description: A regional organization focused on promoting climate-smart agriculture.

entities.name: CAPACITY DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of strengthening the skills and abilities of farming households and institutions.
